---
title: "Langley Adventures. By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “Langley School”"
---

## Langley Adventures. By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “Langley School”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1883
**Genre:** Fiction:
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Walter Smith (late Mozley), 34, King Street, Covent Garden, London.

### Notes

Contains: ‘A Patchwork fever’; ‘Widow Wilder’s Windfall’; ‘Burrs’; ‘Left Out’; and ‘Horse Sausage’.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
